niche: AI tools & how-to — practical, teach-you-something content for a faceless YouTube Shorts channel. Every topic must teach the viewer one concrete, usable thing: how to use an AI tool, or the best AI tools for a specific task.

image_subjects.ai_workspace: A clean modern desk with a single laptop displaying a glowing AI chat interface, soft neon-green rim light, pitch-black room, cinematic shallow depth of field
image_subjects.robot_hand: A sleek robotic hand typing on a backlit mechanical keyboard, shallow depth of field, dark cinematic, single overhead spotlight
image_subjects.neural_net: Abstract glowing neural-network nodes suspended in deep black space, neon green and electric blue connections, cinematic 3D render
image_subjects.automation_flow: A flowchart of connected glowing nodes floating above a dark desk, neon-green data flowing between them, cinematic industrial
image_subjects.phone_ai: A hand holding a phone showing an AI assistant mid-response, dark defocused cafe background at f/1.4, cinematic warm grade
image_subjects.code_screen: Close-up of a curved monitor showing an AI prompt and its response, neon screen glow lighting a dark room, hands on keyboard
image_subjects.future_tech: A young person wearing AR glasses with holographic AI panels floating around them, dark cinematic, neon accents
image_subjects.speed_work: Long motion-blur light trails wrapping around a laptop on a dark desk, suggesting fast automated work, cinematic

dalle_prompt_modifiers.style: shot on RED Komodo 6K, anamorphic lens, f/1.8 shallow depth of field, ISO 3200 film grain, Kodachrome cinematic color grade, 4K resolution
dalle_prompt_modifiers.lighting: single-source dramatic lighting, deep shadows, strong chiaroscuro contrast, neon-green accent light
dalle_prompt_modifiers.forbidden: absolutely no text, no watermarks, no logos, no UI elements, no solid black rectangles, no blank zones

brand_tone: Gen Z AI-native energy. Practical, fast, no hype. Teaches young people how to actually use AI tools to work faster and smarter. Bold, direct, neon-green aesthetic, zero fluff. Every video leaves the viewer with something they can use today.
